name: Poppy Seed Holiday Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, baking powder, sugar, poppy seeds, almond extract, and vanilla extract.
2. Add eggs, milk, oil to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 5 x 9-inch loaf pans.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 1/4 hours or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Brush the hot loaves with a mixture of sugar, almond extract, orange juice, and melted butter before serving.
